steps.title: Pinpoint what distinguishes the two exhibitions
steps.content: The underlined claim contrasts Reckoning and Resilience with prior exhibitions like Across County Lines (described as a photography exhibition). It argues that the breadth of disciplines is what sets Reckoning and Resilience apart.

steps.title: Find the supporting evidence
steps.content: Choice C identifies three distinct artistic disciplines—painting, photography, and textiles—among the featured artists, proving Reckoning and Resilience spans multiple disciplines. The other choices either show only a single discipline (A) or address factors unrelated to the exhibition's scope (B and D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
